name: cortex-protocol
description: User-owned, cross-agent memory for AI agents — local, BYOK, nothing phones home.
long_description: Cortex gives your agent persistent, cross-session memory. Save durable facts/preferences with `memorize`, retrieve them with `recall` (hybrid dense + BM25 retrieval). Memories live in a local SQLite file; embeddings use your own Gemini key (BYOK). Open-source (Apache-2.0).

tools.name: memorize
tools.description: Save a durable memory (fact, preference, decision).

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Retrieve the memories most relevant to a query.

tools.name: recall_about
tools.description: Exhaustive dossier for one entity (requires CORTEX_GRAPH=1).

tools.name: recall_timeline
tools.description: Dated event timeline for a topic (requires CORTEX_EPISODIC=1).

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: List the most recently saved memories.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API key
gemini_api_key.description: Your own Google Gemini API key (BYOK). Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

db_path.title: Memory database path
db_path.description: Where memories are stored (a local SQLite file).

user_id.title: Memory namespace
user_id.description: Namespace within the database (lets one machine hold separate memory sets).
